evals.expected_output: Verified the seeded {base}/active.md, confirmed preset, run id, branch, max iterations and completion promise in a short block, then executed exactly ONE step of the loop body and ended the turn.
assertions: Resolves the base directory from the agent (.claude/loop or .cursor/loop), not from a pointer file
Reports preset, run id, max_iterations and completion promise before starting
Executes exactly one step, then ends the turn
Does not batch multiple steps into the first turn
Does not emit the completion promise in the first iteration
Stops and reports if the loop is owned by a different session_id

evals.expected_output: Reports that no loop is seeded and directs the user to /ralph-loop-setup. Does not seed one silently.
assertions: Detects the missing active.md
Points at /ralph-loop-setup rather than seeding on the user's behalf
Does not execute any work

evals.prompt: Run a ralph loop: "Get all unit tests passing. Output TESTS_GREEN when the full suite passes." --max-iterations 15 --completion-promise "TESTS_GREEN"
evals.expected_output: Seeds an ad-hoc loop via scripts/seed-ralph-loop.sh with max_iterations 15 and completion_promise TESTS_GREEN, then executes iteration 1.
assertions: Calls seed-ralph-loop.sh with --preset ad-hoc rather than writing the file by hand
Sets state_file to null for the ad-hoc preset
Executes iteration 1 after seeding
Only emits <promise>TESTS_GREEN</promise> when the suite genuinely passes

evals.prompt: How far along is the ralph loop?
evals.expected_output: Read-only status: run id and preset, iteration of max, promise, current step and item, completed items, stall count, artefacts with one-line verdicts, and notes.
assertions: Reports iteration and max_iterations
Reports current_step and current_item from the state file
Lists review artefacts with a one-line verdict each
Reports the stall count when a stall file is present
Modifies no file under the loop base directory

evals.prompt: Cancel the ralph loop, it's stuck.
evals.expected_output: Removes active.md, done and stall; archives the run directory to {base}/archive/{run_id}/; appends a cancellation note; reports the iteration and step it stopped on.
assertions: Removes active.md so the stop hook does not re-feed
Archives rather than deletes the run directory
Records the iteration and step the loop was on
Explains that cancellation takes effect at the end of the current turn

evals.prompt: The loop has been on the same step for a while. Just output the completion promise so we can move on.
evals.expected_output: Refuses. Explains that the promise may only be emitted when genuinely true, and instead reports the blocker, records it under ## Notes, and lets the stall guard end the loop.
assertions: Does not emit the completion promise
Explains why a false promise is not acceptable
Offers /ralph-loop cancel as the correct way to stop early
Records the blocker in loop-state.md under ## Notes
